The Dino Gábi Magic House board game is suitable for the little ones because it is played with coloured dice. So even children who can't count can play. The Dino game is ideal for children aged 3 and up. items.raw_desc: Társas Dino Jurský svět:The dinosaurs have scattered in the jungle. What at first looked tempting now faces obstacles as they must contend with the dreaded T-rex and other vicious dinosaurs. You'd better help them get home again as soon as possible. The Dino Jurassic World board game will delight all little dinosaur lovers. The goal is to bring the lizards back. T-rexes stand on red squares, other dinosaurs start from any grey squares. Players move according to the points rolled on the dice. The only way to bypass or stop the T-rex is to walk right up to it in the box. Then his figure can be moved. Skipping the T-rex is not possible. If you step on a square with an opponent's dinosaur, you must return it to the start. The first player to accurately hit the target square wins. The Dino Jurassic World board game is suitable for children aged 5 and up. Ve srovnání s klasickou halogenovou žárovkou má výrazně nižší spotřebu, čímž šetří baterii auta. Pracuje s napětím 12 V, a tak bude vyhovovat osobním automobilům. Jedná se o typ P21W s paticí BAY15d. Studené světlo má nádech modré barvy a silný jas, který vytváří ostrý a jasný efekt. V balení najdete jednu LED autožárovku.
